title: COMPLETE BALLOON PLANNER REBUILD - ALL 190 ARRANGEMENTS WITH COLOR FILTERING
user_requirement: Show all 190 arrangements. Color buttons filter which arrangements are visible. Proper gallery layout.

compliance_rules.RULE_0: EMISSION_GATE - Will not output until all steps complete with evidence
compliance_rules.RULE_2: NO_PARTIAL_COMPLIANCE - Will complete all 7 workflow steps: code → build → test local → commit → push → deploy → verify
compliance_rules.RULE_6: KNOWN_WORKING_CODE_ONLY - Using proven Swiper + Fancybox pattern
compliance_rules.RULE_7: EVIDENCE_BEFORE_ASSERTION - Will show curl verification before claiming success
compliance_rules.RULE_16: COMPLETE_WORKFLOW_TESTING - Must test locally with evidence before commit

steps.task_name: ANALYZE existing arrangements-photo.js to understand color relationships
steps.action: Read arrangements-photo.js (190 items) and identify which arrangement belongs to which color family
steps.output: Understand data structure: each arrangement has id, name, thumb, photo, description
steps.verbose_code_comment: Parse arrangement data to map: arrangement_id -> color_family. Since arrangements don't have explicit color field, will use naming patterns or create mapping based on visual grouping from original data.

steps.task_name: CREATE mapping: which arrangements belong to which color family
steps.action: Generate color_family_mapping.json that groups all 190 arrangements by their color families (White & Cream, Gold & Champagne, etc.)
steps.verbose_code_comment: Build accurate color family grouping. Since original arrangements.js doesn't have color metadata, will create mapping based on file naming patterns or sequential grouping. This mapping is CRITICAL for filtering functionality.

steps.task_name: REWRITE gallery-data.js to include ALL 190 arrangements
steps.action: Populate defaultGallery.images with ALL 190 arrangement photos. Populate colorCollections with filtered subsets.
steps.output: gallery-data.js with defaultGallery containing 190 images + colorCollections with filtered arrangements per color
steps.verbose_code_comment: Generate gallery-data.js programmatically from arrangements.js. Structure: defaultGallery.images = [all 190 photos], colorCollections[slug].images = [filtered by color]. This is the DATA LAYER that drives everything.

steps.task_name: UPDATE main.js to handle 190 items + color filtering
steps.action: Modify renderCollection() and color swatch click handler to correctly filter and display arrangement subsets
steps.output: main.js that properly initializes Swiper with correct slide count and syncs color selection state
steps.verbose_code_comment: Ensure main.js handles large dataset (190 items). Check: Swiper initialization with proper breakpoints, thumb sync for 190 slides, DOM memory efficiency, event listener cleanup. Test color click -> filters gallery correctly.

steps.task_name: TEST locally: Verify page renders, galleries load, filtering works
steps.action: Use curl to verify HTML loads, all 190 images are referenced, color swatches render, Swiper initializes
steps.input: Running server on localhost:8888 + updated files
steps.output: Curl verification showing HTTP 200s, no console errors, functionality confirmed
steps.verbose_code_comment: Local test with evidence: curl GET page, check for 190 image references, verify color filter buttons exist, confirm Swiper library loads, validate no JavaScript syntax errors in main.js

steps.action: Stage and commit: gallery-data.js (190 arrangements), main.js (filtering logic), CSS (if updated)
steps.output: Git commit with message describing changes
steps.verbose_code_comment: Commit message must explain: 'Populate gallery with all 190 balloon arrangements. Add color family filtering. Arrange by color group: White/Cream, Gold/Champagne, Brown/Mocha, Pink/Fuchsia, Purple, Navy, Grey/Silver. Each color family shows filtered arrangement subset when selected.'

steps.action: git push origin main (or default branch)
steps.verbose_code_comment: Push to remote. This triggers any configured auto-deploy to production. Verify: 'git log --oneline' shows new commit, GitHub repo reflects changes.

steps.task_name: VERIFY production: Test live app, confirm 190 arrangements load, color filtering works
steps.action: Test deployed app: can see galleries, click colors, arrangements filter correctly
steps.output: Evidence of working production app with all 190 arrangements visible
steps.verbose_code_comment: Production verification: gallery loads, thumbnails appear, click color button -> gallery changes to show only arrangements in that color family. Confirm: responsive on mobile, no console errors, Swiper works, Fancybox zoom works.

must_have: All 190 balloon arrangements visible in defaultGallery
Color family buttons filter gallery to show only that color's arrangements
Swiper gallery + thumbnails work with large dataset
Reset button returns to viewing all 190 arrangements
Local test passes with curl verification
success_criteria.acceptance_test: Click 'Pink & Fuchsia' -> gallery shows only pink/fuchsia arrangements. Click 'Reset' -> gallery shows all 190. Click thumbnail -> main image updates. Click arrangement photo -> lightbox opens.
